query:
SELECT i.id, i.anuncio_id, i.estado, i.from_parada_id, i.notas,
       p.cobertizo_id as dest_cobertizo, p.orientacion as dest_orient,
       a.producto, a.cliente
FROM instalaciones i
JOIN paradas p ON i.parada_id = p.id
JOIN anuncios a ON i.anuncio_id = a.id
WHERE i.estado = 'Relocalizacion'
ORDER BY i.id;
